errors.message:
TRON_NETWORK environment variable is not set. Please set TRON_NETWORK to "mainnet" or "shasta". Example: export TRON_NETWORK=mainnet

To use the TRON rail, you must set the TRON_NETWORK environment variable:
  export TRON_NETWORK=mainnet   # For production/mainnet
  export TRON_NETWORK=shasta    # For testing on Shasta testnet

You also need a TronGrid API key:
  export TRONGRID_API_KEY=your_api_key_here

Get a free API key at: https://www.trongrid.io/
